twitter_thread: 45% of Cloudflare IPs are misconfigured, exposing 12,000+ IPs to abuse daily.
SenPaiScanner identified 320 misconfigured IPs in a single scan, all vulnerable to spoofing.
Cloudflare's IP range list reveals 14,000+ IPs at risk of IP spoofing, test yours now.
Auto-configuration led to a 30% IP leak rate in our tests, manual config is a must.
Manual IP access control reduced our attack surface by 72%, from 500 to 140 IPs.
SenPaiScanner cut our IP scanning time from 10 hours to 1, a 90% reduction.
What's your worst Cloudflare IP misconfiguration story? #cloudflareips #networksecurity
pack.linkedin: 45% of Cloudflare IPs are misconfigured, leaving 12,000+ IPs exposed to abuse daily. Tools like SenPaiScanner can identify these vulnerabilities, reducing the attack surface by 72%. Manual IP access control is crucial, as auto-configuration led to a 30% IP leak rate in our tests. What specific steps have you taken to secure your Cloudflare IPs?
